help.title: Help & Support
help.subtitle: Find answers, learn, contact support
help.dragOrClick: Drag a file here or click to select
help.searchTickets: Search by ticket number or subject

0.question: How to add a new vending machine?
0.answer: Go to "Machines" section -> click "Add Machine" -> fill in the serial number and location details -> save. The machine will appear in the list after synchronization.

1.question: How to set up notifications?
1.answer: Open "Settings" -> "Notifications" -> select channels (Email, Telegram, SMS) and event types you want to be notified about.

2.question: How to invite an employee to the system?
2.answer: Go to "Team" -> click "Invite" -> enter email and select role. The employee will receive a registration link.

3.question: What roles are available in the system?
3.answer: Owner, Administrator, Manager, Operator, Warehouse Worker, Accountant, Content Manager, Viewer. Each role has its own set of permissions (RBAC).

4.question: How to import existing data?
4.answer: Go to "AI Import" -> upload a file (xlsx, csv, json) -> AI will automatically detect data type and map fields -> review and confirm import.

0.question: What do machine statuses mean?
0.answer: Green (Online) - machine is operating normally. Yellow (Attention) - requires attention (low supplies, temperature deviation). Red (Offline) - no connection or critical error.

1.question: How to set up a planogram?
1.answer: Open machine card -> "Planogram" tab -> drag products to the desired cells -> save. The planogram determines which drinks are available on a specific machine.

2.question: How to track temperature?
2.answer: The machine card has a temperature widget with history. To set up alerts: "Settings" -> "Monitoring" -> set threshold values (normal 85-95°C).

3.question: How does telemetry work?
3.answer: Machines send data every 30 sec: ingredient levels, temperature, cup count, errors. If connection is lost for > 5 min, the system creates an alert.

4.question: How to view service history?
4.answer: Machine card -> "History" tab -> all operations: refills, repairs, collections. Filter by date and operation type.

5.question: How to set up a scheduled maintenance plan?
5.answer: Machine card -> "Maintenance" -> create a schedule (weekly/monthly) -> specify type of work (cleaning, filter replacement) -> assign an employee. Maintenance notifications are sent 24 hours in advance.

0.question: How to export a report?
0.answer: In the "Reports" section, select the desired report -> configure parameters (period, grouping) -> click "Export" -> choose format (PDF, Excel, CSV).

1.question: How does payment reconciliation work?
1.answer: The system automatically matches transactions from payment systems (Payme, Click, Uzum) with collection data. Discrepancies are flagged for manual review in "Finance" -> "Reconciliation".

2.question: How to set up automatic reports?
2.answer: In "Reports" -> "Report List" -> select report -> "Schedule" -> specify frequency (daily/weekly/monthly), recipients, and format.

3.question: How to connect Multikassa fiscalization?
3.answer: "Settings" -> "Integrations" -> "Multikassa" -> enter API key -> activate. All receipts will be automatically fiscalized. Receipt status in "Finance" -> "Fiscalization".

0.question: How does the bonus system work?
0.answer: Customers earn points for purchases (1 UZS = 1 point with cashback based on level). 5 levels: Bronze->Silver->Gold->Platinum->Diamond. Points can be spent on drinks or transferred to friends.

1.question: How to create a promo campaign?
1.answer: "Promotions" -> "Add Promotion" -> fill in: name, description, discount type (%), promo code, conditions, period. The promotion will appear in the mobile app and on the website.

2.question: How to set up quests for customers?
2.answer: "Loyalty" -> "Quests" -> "Create Quest" -> select type (daily/weekly/special), completion condition, and reward.

3.question: How do referrals work?
3.answer: Customer shares referral code -> friend makes first purchase of 5000+ UZS -> both receive 10,000 bonus points. Referral statistics in "Customers" -> profile.

0.question: How to connect Payme/Click?
0.answer: "Settings" -> "Integrations" -> find the desired payment system -> "Connect" -> enter API keys from the payment system dashboard -> complete a test transaction.

1.question: How to set up a Telegram bot?
1.answer: "Settings" -> "Integrations" -> "Telegram Bot" -> copy bot token -> add bot to chat -> complete verification. 2 bots: @vendhub_bot (customers) and @vendhub_staff_bot (staff).

2.question: Is 1C supported?
2.answer: Yes, there is a ready-made integration with 1C:Enterprise. Data exchange: directories, documents, balances. Setup: "Integrations" -> "1C" -> upload exchange configuration.

3.question: Is there an API for developers?
3.answer: Yes, REST API v1 with JWT authorization. Documentation: /api/v1/docs. Rate limit: 100 requests/min. To get a token: "Settings" -> "API" -> "Create Token".

4.question: How does the mobile app offline mode work?
4.answer: The mobile app caches the menu and available operations. Without internet, the customer can browse products and create an order (saved to queue). Synchronization happens automatically when connection is restored.
